input_schema.title: DedupeBugsInput

similarity_threshold.title: Similarity Threshold
similarity_threshold.description: Cosine threshold for the text-similarity fallback

input_schema.description:
Input payload - a batch of bug reports to dedupe.

Each bug dict may carry: id, title, body, error_code, component,
stack_trace, repro_url, repro_steps, reporter, vote_count,
comment_count, created_at. Anything missing is treated as empty.

name: dedupe_bugs

output_schema.title: DedupeBugsResult
output_schema.description: Dedup report - clusters (with draft merges), singletons, edges, stats.

description: Cluster duplicate bug reports and return a draft merge per cluster. Structured-match first (stack-trace hash, component+error_code, normalized repro URL), with TF-IDF cosine and character-trigram Jaccard fallbacks. Output includes clusters, a canonical pick per cluster, and a draft merged bug (title, body with cross-references, deduped repro steps, union of normalized stack traces).
